Equations.Mines_Count: Variable_Self.StructureCount {Parameter_Type = "Mining_Facility_Minerals_Ground", Parameter_Type = "Mining_Facility_Tibanna_Ground", Parameter_Type = "Mining_Facility_Spice_Ground", Parameter_Type = "Mining_Facility_Minerals_Space", Parameter_Type = "Mining_Facility_Tibanna_Space", Parameter_Type = "Mining_Facility_Spice_Space", Parameter_Only_Consider_Complete = 1.0}
Equations.Capital_Count: Variable_Self.StructureCount {Parameter_Type = "Empire_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Republic_Capital", Parameter_Type = "PA_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Maldrood_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Eriadu_Capital", Parameter_Type = "NewRep_Capital", Parameter_Type = "CIS_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Sith_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Rancor_Base", Parameter_Type = "ZE_Capital_Alternate", Parameter_Type = "Imperial_Proteus_Capital", Parameter_Type = "CSA_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Yevetha_Capital", Parameter_Type = "EOTH_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Chiss_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Hapan_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Mando_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Republic_Sector_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Shadow_Collective_Capital", Parameter_Type = "CIS_Sector_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Techno_Union_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Hutt_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Revolt_Rural_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Revolt_Urban_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Revolt_Mercenary_Capital", Parameter_Type = "Revolt_Corporate_Capital", Parameter_Only_Consider_Complete = 1.0}
